g.text: A I A G E N T M E S H
LangGraph orchestration · deterministic or Claude (LLM) reasoning
the agents reach Splunk through standard, typed tool calls — no brittle glue
detect → reason → remediate → verify recovery in telemetry
“Every enterprise sits on a graph it can’t see.”
TITAN HELIX makes it visible — agents reason over Splunk through MCP, and close the loop autonomously.
